IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (24184357.pdf)
SUMMARY: Human Resource Professional with academic background in human resources management and hands-on experience hiring, training, orientating, and developing employees. Currently serves as a one-person HR role managing 63 employees for a fast-growing organization.
SKILLS: Analytical Skills, Interpersonal Skills, Organizational Skills, Communication Skills, Recruiting and Staffing, Performance Management, Employee Relations, Training & Development, Employment Law, Compensation, Labor-Manager Relations, Project Management, Leadership, Problem Solving, Data Analysis, Budget Management, HRIS, Benefits Administration, Compensation, Employee Engagement, Conflict Resolution, Team Building
